title: kind namespace execution profile
objective: Add L2_KIND_NAMESPACE as an optional profile for multi-service preview and QA tasks using namespace-per-run semantics.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Generate infra/local-task-k8s templates only when the profile is enabled.
Define namespace-per-run lifecycle: create namespace, run worker/preview/QA jobs, collect artifacts, cleanup namespace.
Keep kind disabled by default and require explicit opt-in.
Add config-generation tests that do not require a live Kubernetes cluster.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: L2 kind namespace-per-run 실행 profile skeleton을 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
